summary_en: 14.0M shares (1.8% of shares outstanding), ¥30.0B upper limit, open-market purchase on TSE, 2026/5/15–7/31, to improve capital efficiency and preserve capital-policy flexibility.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock pursuant to Company Code Article 165(2) and applicable Article 156 by Board Resolution on 2026/5/14)
translation_en_brief: On 2026/5/14, NEXON's board authorized a buyback of up to 14.0 million ordinary shares (1.8% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for an upper limit of ¥30.0 billion. Acquisition will occur via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from 2026/5/15 through 2026/7/31. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and preserve flexibility in capital allocation policy. As of 2026/4/30, the company held no treasury stock; outstanding shares (excluding treasury) totaled 792,881,641.
